connections.gloss: bow (self) down, crouch, fall down (flat), humbly beseech, do (make) obeisance, do reverence, make to stoop, worship.

connections.def: from 4314 and a probable derivative of 2965 (meaning to kiss, like a dog licking his master's hand); to fawn or crouch to, i.e. (literally or figuratively) prostrate oneself in homage (do reverence…
from latris (a hired menial); to minister (to God), i.e. render religious homage:--serve, do the service,
middle voice of an apparently primary verb; to revere, i.e. adore:--devout, religious,
